data.body: Investigation complete (bot-psychologist). Root cause: preplanning writes context to /tmp/preplanning-context-<epic-id>.json which is ephemeral and environment-specific. Taxonomy: Multi-File State De-sync (#5). Hypothesis tests: all 4 confirmed. Files affected: preplanning/SKILL.md (lines 731-781, line 135), implementation-plan/SKILL.md (lines 162-175). Proposed fix: replace /tmp write with dso ticket comment PREPLANNING_CONTEXT: <json>; update implementation-plan to read from ticket comments. Confidence: HIGH. GATE 1a: N/A (llm-behavioral). Step 3.5: PASS (confirmed hypothesis explains root cause).
